─[1]-Project──
lorehq
─[2]-Primitives──
Rules Skills Agents Fieldnotes Runbooks
─[3]-Guides──
CommandsCustomizationGuidesPlatform SupportWorking Across Repos
─[4]-Workflow──
Active Work Architecture
─[ Session Token Usage From Claude Logs ]─ ┐

Session Token Usage From Claude Logs

Compute per-session token usage, costs, and execution time from local Claude JSONL logs. Breaks down orchestrator vs worker tokens, splits answer vs capture phases, and computes API-equivalent costs.

Prerequisites

  • Claude logs available at ~/.claude/projects/
  • Node.js available as node

1) Full breakdown for a specific session

Set these vars first:

SESSION_ID="your-session-id"
PROJECT_SLUG="-home-user-Github-your-repo"

Then run:

node - <<'NODE'
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

const session = process.env.SESSION_ID;
const project = process.env.PROJECT_SLUG;
const base = path.join(process.env.HOME, '.claude', 'projects', project);

// API pricing per million tokens (as of Feb 2026)
const PRICING = {
  'claude-opus-4-6':   { input: 5.00, output: 25.00, cacheRead: 0.50, cacheCreate: 6.25 },
  'claude-sonnet-4-6': { input: 1.50, output: 7.50,  cacheRead: 0.15, cacheCreate: 1.875 },
  'claude-haiku-4-5':  { input: 1.00, output: 5.00,  cacheRead: 0.10, cacheCreate: 1.25 },
};

function pricingKey(model) {
  if (!model) return null;
  if (model.includes('opus'))   return 'claude-opus-4-6';
  if (model.includes('sonnet')) return 'claude-sonnet-4-6';
  if (model.includes('haiku'))  return 'claude-haiku-4-5';
  return null;
}

function formatTokens(n) { return n >= 1000 ? `${(n / 1000).toFixed(1)}k` : String(n); }

function formatDuration(ms) {
  const s = Math.round(ms / 1000);
  return `${Math.floor(s / 60)}m ${s % 60}s`;
}

function computeCost(totals, model) {
  const rates = PRICING[model];
  if (!rates) return null;
  return (
    (totals.input / 1e6) * rates.input +
    (totals.output / 1e6) * rates.output +
    (totals.cacheRead / 1e6) * rates.cacheRead +
    (totals.cacheCreate / 1e6) * rates.cacheCreate
  );
}

function totalCostOfBucket(bucket) {
  let sum = 0;
  for (const [model, t] of Object.entries(bucket)) {
    const c = computeCost(t, model);
    if (c != null) sum += c;
  }
  return sum;
}

// Extract deduplicated usage entries with timestamps and model info
function extractUsage(file) {
  const lines = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8').split('\n');
  const seen = new Set();
  const entries = [];
  for (const line of lines) {
    if (!line.trim()) continue;
    let obj; try { obj = JSON.parse(line); } catch { continue; }
    const msg = obj.message;
    if (!(msg && typeof msg === 'object' && msg.usage)) continue;
    const key = [
      obj.requestId || '', msg.id || '',
      msg.usage.input_tokens || 0, msg.usage.output_tokens || 0,
      msg.usage.cache_read_input_tokens || 0, msg.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens || 0,
    ].join('|');
    if (seen.has(key)) continue;
    seen.add(key);
    entries.push({
      ts: obj.timestamp ? new Date(obj.timestamp).getTime() : 0,
      model: pricingKey(msg.model) || 'unknown',
      input: Number(msg.usage.input_tokens || 0),
      output: Number(msg.usage.output_tokens || 0),
      cacheRead: Number(msg.usage.cache_read_input_tokens || 0),
      cacheCreate: Number(msg.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens || 0),
    });
  }
  return entries;
}

// Aggregate usage entries by model, split into total/answer/capture
function aggregate(entries, splitTs) {
  const buckets = { total: {}, answer: {}, capture: {} };
  for (const e of entries) {
    const phase = (splitTs && e.ts >= splitTs) ? 'capture' : 'answer';
    for (const bucket of ['total', phase]) {
      if (!buckets[bucket][e.model]) buckets[bucket][e.model] = { input: 0, output: 0, cacheRead: 0, cacheCreate: 0, requests: 0 };
      const b = buckets[bucket][e.model];
      b.requests += 1; b.input += e.input; b.output += e.output;
      b.cacheRead += e.cacheRead; b.cacheCreate += e.cacheCreate;
    }
  }
  return buckets;
}

// Sum durationMs from system events, split by capture boundary.
// Fallback: if capture boundary exists but no capture durationMs events,
// compute capture time from wall-clock timestamps of the capture turn.
function computeTimings(file, splitTs) {
  const lines = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8').split('\n').filter(Boolean);
  let totalMs = 0, answerMs = 0, captureMs = 0;
  for (const l of lines) {
    let o; try { o = JSON.parse(l); } catch { continue; }
    if (o.durationMs == null) continue;
    totalMs += o.durationMs;
    const ts = o.timestamp ? new Date(o.timestamp).getTime() : 0;
    if (splitTs && ts >= splitTs) captureMs += o.durationMs;
    else answerMs += o.durationMs;
  }
  if (totalMs === 0) return null;

  // Fallback: capture boundary exists but no capture durationMs
  if (splitTs && captureMs === 0) {
    const events = [];
    for (const l of lines) {
      let o; try { o = JSON.parse(l); } catch { continue; }
      if (!o.timestamp) continue;
      const role = (o.message && o.message.role) || o.type;
      events.push({ ts: new Date(o.timestamp).getTime(), role });
    }
    events.sort((a, b) => a.ts - b.ts);
    // Find first user event after the last durationMs event (capture turn start)
    let capStart = null;
    for (const e of events) { if (e.ts >= splitTs && e.role === 'user' && !capStart) capStart = e.ts; }
    // Find last event in the capture phase before an idle gap
    let capEnd = null;
    for (let i = 0; i < events.length; i++) {
      if (events[i].ts < (capStart || splitTs)) continue;
      capEnd = events[i].ts;
      if (i + 1 < events.length) {
        const gap = events[i + 1].ts - events[i].ts;
        if (gap > 120000 || (events[i + 1].role === 'user' && gap > 3000)) break;
      }
    }
    if (capStart && capEnd && capEnd > capStart) {
      captureMs = capEnd - capStart;
      totalMs += captureMs;
    }
  }

  return { totalMs, answerMs, captureMs };
}

// Find capture boundary: earliest Write/Edit to skills/knowledge/runbooks
function findCaptureBoundary(files) {
  let earliest = Infinity;
  for (const file of files) {
    const lines = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8').split('\n').filter(Boolean);
    for (const l of lines) {
      let o; try { o = JSON.parse(l); } catch { continue; }
      if (!o.message || !Array.isArray(o.message.content)) continue;
      for (const block of o.message.content) {
        if (block.type !== 'tool_use') continue;
        if (block.name !== 'Write' && block.name !== 'Edit') continue;
        const fp = (block.input && block.input.file_path) || '';
        if (fp.includes('/skills/') || fp.includes('/knowledge/environment/') || fp.includes('/knowledge/runbooks/')) {
          const ts = o.timestamp ? new Date(o.timestamp).getTime() : Infinity;
          if (ts < earliest) earliest = ts;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  return earliest === Infinity ? null : earliest;
}

function printRoleBreakdown(label, agg) {
  for (const [model, t] of Object.entries(agg.total)) {
    const cost = computeCost(t, model);
    const short = model.replace('claude-','').replace('-4-6',' 4.6').replace('-4-5',' 4.5');
    console.log(`  ${label} (${short}): ${t.requests} req | in=${formatTokens(t.input)} out=${formatTokens(t.output)} cacheRd=${formatTokens(t.cacheRead)} cacheCr=${formatTokens(t.cacheCreate)} | $${(cost||0).toFixed(4)}`);
  }
}

// --- Main ---
const mainFile = path.join(base, `${session}.jsonl`);
const subdir = path.join(base, session, 'subagents');

// Collect all JSONL files
const allFiles = [];
if (fs.existsSync(mainFile)) allFiles.push(mainFile);
const workerFiles = [];
if (fs.existsSync(subdir)) {
  for (const f of fs.readdirSync(subdir).filter(f => f.endsWith('.jsonl'))) {
    const p = path.join(subdir, f);
    allFiles.push(p);
    workerFiles.push({ name: f, path: p });
  }
}

// Capture boundary
const splitTs = findCaptureBoundary(allFiles);

// Timing (from orchestrator durationMs)
const timing = fs.existsSync(mainFile) ? computeTimings(mainFile, splitTs) : null;

// Orchestrator tokens
const orchAgg = aggregate(fs.existsSync(mainFile) ? extractUsage(mainFile) : [], splitTs);

// Worker tokens
const workerAggs = workerFiles.map(wf => ({ name: wf.name, agg: aggregate(extractUsage(wf.path), splitTs) }));

// --- Output ---
console.log('=== Timing ===');
if (timing) {
  console.log(`  Total:   ${formatDuration(timing.totalMs)}`);
  console.log(`  Answer:  ${formatDuration(timing.answerMs)}`);
  console.log(`  Capture: ${formatDuration(timing.captureMs)}`);
} else {
  console.log('  (no durationMs events found)');
}

console.log('\n=== Orchestrator ===');
printRoleBreakdown('Orch', orchAgg);
const orchTotalCost = totalCostOfBucket(orchAgg.total);
const orchAnswerCost = totalCostOfBucket(orchAgg.answer);
const orchCaptureCost = totalCostOfBucket(orchAgg.capture);

let wkTotalCost = 0, wkAnswerCost = 0, wkCaptureCost = 0;
if (workerAggs.length > 0) {
  console.log(`\n=== Workers (${workerAggs.length}) ===`);
  for (const wa of workerAggs) {
    for (const [model, t] of Object.entries(wa.agg.total)) {
      const cost = computeCost(t, model);
      const short = model.replace('claude-','').replace('-4-6',' 4.6').replace('-4-5',' 4.5');
      console.log(`  ${wa.name.replace('.jsonl','')} (${short}): ${t.requests} req | in=${formatTokens(t.input)} out=${formatTokens(t.output)} cacheRd=${formatTokens(t.cacheRead)} cacheCr=${formatTokens(t.cacheCreate)} | $${(cost||0).toFixed(4)}`);
    }
    wkTotalCost += totalCostOfBucket(wa.agg.total);
    wkAnswerCost += totalCostOfBucket(wa.agg.answer);
    wkCaptureCost += totalCostOfBucket(wa.agg.capture);
  }
}

console.log('\n=== Session Total ===');
const totalCost = orchTotalCost + wkTotalCost;
const answerCost = orchAnswerCost + wkAnswerCost;
const captureCost = orchCaptureCost + wkCaptureCost;
console.log(`  Total:   $${totalCost.toFixed(4)}`);
console.log(`  Answer:  $${answerCost.toFixed(4)}`);
console.log(`  Capture: $${captureCost.toFixed(4)}`);
if (splitTs) console.log(`  Split at: ${new Date(splitTs).toISOString()}`);
else console.log('  (no capture detected — all cost is answer)');
NODE

2) Find latest session for a project

PROJECT_SLUG="-home-user-Github-your-repo"
ls -t "$HOME/.claude/projects/$PROJECT_SLUG"/*.jsonl | head -n 1

Use the filename (without .jsonl) as SESSION_ID.

3) Quick cost for latest session

Combines steps 1 and 2:

PROJECT_SLUG="-home-user-Github-your-repo"
export SESSION_ID=$(ls -t "$HOME/.claude/projects/$PROJECT_SLUG"/*.jsonl | head -1 | xargs basename | sed 's/.jsonl//')
export PROJECT_SLUG
# then run the node script from step 1

Notes

  • Deduplicates repeated usage entries from streaming updates (Claude Code emits duplicate usage per content block in multi-block responses).
  • Subagent logs live at ~/.claude/projects/<project>/<session-id>/subagents/*.jsonl.
  • Pricing uses standard API rates. Cache read tokens are discounted (10% of input rate). Cache creation tokens are 125% of input rate.
  • For Claude Max (subscription) users, these costs represent API-equivalent spend — useful for comparing relative efficiency, not actual charges.
  • Execution time uses durationMs from system events in the orchestrator JSONL — Claude Code’s per-turn active processing timer. This directly measures agent execution time without needing idle-subtraction heuristics. If durationMs is absent (rare — seen in 1/50 test sessions), the field is omitted. Some capture turns lack a durationMs event; in those cases, capture time falls back to wall-clock timestamps of the capture turn (start = first user event near capture boundary, end = last event before idle gap).
  • Answer/capture split uses the timestamp of the earliest Write/Edit targeting /skills/, /knowledge/environment/, or /knowledge/runbooks/ across all JSONL files (orchestrator + subagents). Everything before = answer phase, everything from that point onward = capture phase. Sessions with no qualifying writes have zero capture cost and time.
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
